metadata.description: Generated test dataset for NLP to SQL evaluation

test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT * FROM students;
SELECT name FROM employees;
SELECT * FROM cars;
SELECT product_name FROM products;
SELECT * FROM customers;

test_cases.natural_language: What is the average marks of students?
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT AVG(marks) as result FROM students;
SELECT SUM(salary) as result FROM employees;

test_cases.natural_language: Count how many products are available
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(id) as result FROM products;

test_cases.natural_language: Find the maximum price of cars
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT MAX(price) as result FROM cars;

test_cases.natural_language: What is the minimum age of employees
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT MIN(age) as result FROM employees;

test_cases.natural_language: Show top 10 students with highest CGPA
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT id, cgpa FROM students ORDER BY cgpa DESC LIMIT 10;

test_cases.natural_language: Get bottom 5 cars with lowest price
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT id, price FROM cars ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, salary FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT id, rating FROM products ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, marks FROM students ORDER BY marks ASC LIMIT 7;

test_cases.natural_language: Find students with marks greater than 80
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT * FROM students WHERE marks > 80;

test_cases.natural_language: Show cars with price between 20000 and 50000
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT * FROM cars WHERE price BETWEEN 20000 AND 50000;
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE department = 'Engineering';
SELECT * FROM products WHERE rating > 4.5;
SELECT * FROM students WHERE year = '2024';

test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT id, marks FROM students WHERE year = '2024' ORDER BY marks DESC LIMIT 5;

test_cases.natural_language: Average salary of employees in IT department
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT AVG(salary) as result FROM employees WHERE department = 'IT';

test_cases.natural_language: Products with rating above 4.5 in category Electronics
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE rating > 4.5 AND category = 'Electronics';

test_cases.natural_language: Top 3 cars with highest price in year 2023
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT id, price FROM cars WHERE year = '2023' ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 3;

test_cases.natural_language: Count students with CGPA greater than 3.5
test_cases.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(id) as result FROM students WHERE cgpa > 3.5;
